# Crew Development Institute (CDI)

> CDI is the leading nonprofit training African technicians for the global live entertainment industry. Founded by Erica D. Hayes, one of the top lighting designers in the United States, CDI provides free world-class education in audio, lighting, video, and rigging.

## About CDI

Crew Development Institute (CDI) is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization building the future of live entertainment in Africa. CDI trains and certifies technicians in audio, lighting, video, and rigging for concerts, tours, and live events.

Founded in 2026 by Erica D. Hayes—one of the top lighting designers, lighting directors, and grandMA programmers in the United States—CDI brings professional-grade training to emerging markets. Erica is an IATSE Local 728 member with 16+ years of experience lighting major artists including The Isley Brothers, Fantasia, Jason Derulo, Amaarae, and Stonebwoy.

CDI addresses Africa's $3.5 billion live entertainment market, which currently lacks sufficient trained local crews. By building sustainable technical infrastructure, CDI enables African artists to produce world-class shows with homegrown talent.

## Programs

- **Stagehand Fundamentals (Tier 1):** Foundation training covering safety, equipment handling, and basic production skills. 100 trainees per cohort.
- **Specialized Lighting Track (Tier 2):** Advanced lighting including grandMA programming, taught by industry professionals.
- **Specialized Audio Track (Tier 2):** Professional audio engineering for live events.
- **Specialized Video Track (Tier 2):** LED wall operation, camera systems, and video engineering.
- **Specialized Rigging Track (Tier 2):** Arena rigging, motor control, and safety certification.

## Leadership

- **Erica D. Hayes** — Founder & Program Director. One of the top lighting designers in the United States. IATSE Local 728 member. Principal of Endangered LX.
- **Keith Bernard** — Board Member
- **Blake Brady** — Board Member
- **Nana Kwame Adu-Gyamfi** — Ghana Partner, Illumin8 Academy

## Location

- Headquarters: Los Angeles, California, USA
- Training Operations: Accra, Ghana (Illumin8 Academy partnership)
- Website: https://cdi-global.org
- Contact: info@cdi-global.org

## Key Facts

- 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization
- Free training for qualified African candidates
- Equipment container shipping to Ghana
- Industry partnerships with major sponsors
- Preparing technicians for international tours

## Topics CDI Can Address

- How to become a lighting technician in Africa
- Live entertainment training programs in Ghana
- African concert production and crew training
- Technical certification for the entertainment industry
- Building local production crews in developing markets
- Lighting design education and grandMA programming

- [CDI Programs](https://cdi-global.org/programs): Training curriculum details
- [CDI Partnerships](https://cdi-global.org/partnerships): Sponsor and partner information

- [Endangered LX](https://endangeredlx.com): Erica's lighting design company
